name: OneStream XF Financial Platform API
what_it_does: OneStream XF REST API for unified corporate performance management (CPM) platform. Enables AI agents to automate financial close and consolidation workflows, load and retrieve budget and forecast data, access financial reports and dashboards, manage data quality rules, integrate with ERP source systems, and automate compliance and regulatory reporting processes.
use_cases: Automating financial close data loads from ERP systems via close management agents
Retrieving consolidated financial statements from reporting automation agents
Loading forecast and budget data from FP&A workflow agents
Monitoring data quality rules and reconciliation status from compliance agents
not_for: Operational accounting and transaction processing without consolidation needs
Small business without multi-entity or multi-currency requirements
Departmental budgeting without enterprise-wide financial consolidation
best_when: A large enterprise finance team running OneStream for financial close, consolidation, and planning wants AI agents to automate data loads, monitor close status, and generate financial reports across business units and geographies.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial consolidation data feeds regulatory filings and board reporting. Automated data loads must be validated and reconciled before impacting the consolidated financials.

auth.notes: OneStream uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials for API access. Separate service accounts required. On-premises and cloud deployments have different auth configurations. API available on cloud SaaS; on-prem requires custom setup.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise CPM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing based on users and modules; IPO 2024 (NYSE: OS)
pricing.notes: Michigan-based company, IPO'd on NYSE in 2024. Large enterprise CPM market leader competing with SAP BPC and Oracle Hyperion. Strong financial close and consolidation focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per service account; enterprise SLAs

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Consolidation data feeds board reports and regulatory filings — validate all automated loads
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 service accounts
No webhooks — must poll or use scheduled jobs for close status monitoring
On-prem vs cloud deployments have different API configurations and endpoints
Financial model complexity (dimensions, entities, scenarios) requires understanding of OneStream data model
Data load failures can corrupt consolidated balances — implement strict error handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Consolidated financial data for board reporting and regulatory compliance. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 service accounts. Enterprise-grade.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial consolidation data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 service accounts. Multi-region data residency.
